title: Work Smarter, Not Harder
short_description: An AI sports-coaching platform: log recovery metrics and get a Random Forest readiness call plus workout, nutrition, and program-balance guidance.
long_description_md:
**Work Smarter, Not Harder** turns daily recovery metrics into coaching decisions. Athletes log sleep, fatigue, soreness and training load, and a **locally-trained Random Forest** classifies training readiness as *Ready*, *Moderate*, or *Rest*.

A recommendation engine turns that into an action plan: what to train, what to fix first, how many calories to eat, and whether to push, maintain, or deload. A built-in **community forum** adds posts, votes, and real-time messaging.

It runs as **three Docker containers** (Flask · MongoDB · AI inference), only the web tier exposed, and ships with CI/CD, tests across all five test types, and a live HTTPS deployment on Azure.

launch.notes: Deployed live on Azure over HTTPS at app.worksmarternotharder.dev. Register with any email (one-time code) to try it; seeded demo data is available on request.
